text: 弗兰克 我们会面的目的 The whole reason we do these meetings, Frank,
就是为从你那儿得到准确的信息 is so I can get accurate information from you.
我始终说票数会很胶着 I always said it was going to be close.
那为什么昨天我读到的报道 Then why did every article I read yesterday
都说领导集团相信法案会通过 say the leadership was confident the bill would pass?
您知道简宁·斯克斯基吗 Do you know Janine Skorsky?
她曾任《先驱报》驻白宫记者 She used to be the Herald's White House correspondent.
我记得简宁 I remember Janine.
她为头条网写了篇文章 She wrote an article for Slugline
报道了一份经核实的计票结果 reporting a verified vote count.
一旦被媒体拿到 那东西就满天飞了 Once the media got ahold of that, it went everywhere.
我不知道她哪弄到的数字 I don't know where she got that number.
或许是她编造的 Maybe she made it up.
是不是她编的不重要 It doesn't matter if she made it up.
外界认为民主党出现了分歧 The democrats seem divided.
领导集团就显得很无能 The leadership looks incompetent.
与财政预算和我们的教育法案相比 But compared to the the budget and our education act,
这不过是个小法案 先生 well, this was a minor bill, sir.
可它恰恰却受全国瞩目 That happened to be in the national spotlight,
这是你想要的 which is what you wanted.
计票我算错了 I got the count wrong.
这很罕见 但确实发生了 It rarely happens, but it happens.
令我担心的是 白宫方面的影响 What worries me is that the White House's influence
没能在国会给你支持 isn't translating into support on the hill.
琳达的参与没起到丝毫作用 Linda's involvement had no effect?
并不是这么回事 先生 I wouldn't say that that's the case, sir.
教育法案之争有没有带来 Did you sense any push-back, any fallout
什么阻力和影响 from the education battle?
先生 事实是我并未出席 Sir, the truth is I wasn't there.
我当时必须得去趟加州 I had to make a trip to California
为我儿子去见斯坦福的教务长 to meet the Provost of Stanford for my son.
我上周跟您提过 I told you about it last week.
这是我的主意 先生 It was my decision, sir.
我当时认定 I made a judgment call
没有她的帮助法案也能通过 that we could pass the bill without her help.
但事实是 这种差距甚微的投票 But, look, tight votes like this,
分析不出个所以然来 you can analyze them to death,
最终结果就是我们票数落后 but at the end of the day, we came up short.
这只归咎于我个人 绝非琳达的错 That's my fault, no one else's. Certainly not Linda's.
我当时就不该离开 I shouldn't have gone.
那场会面毫无成果 The meeting didn't even work.
你不是说他们会重新考虑 I thought you said they were reconsidering.
不 我今早收到一封邮件 No. I got an e-mail this morning.
他们决定不推翻招生办的决定 They decided not to overturn the admissions decision.
天呐 真是遗憾 琳达 Oh, Christ. I'm sorry, Linda.
今天不怎么顺利 Not a great day so far.
不过还是要谢谢你刚才为我打圆场 But I appreciate your covering for me in there.
或许琳达的噩运能变成我的机遇 There may be a way to turn Linda's bad luck into my good fortune.
不过首先我要解决组织内的背叛 But first I must deal with treason within the ranks...
那两个投反对票的叛徒 the two renegades who voted against the bill.
我绝不容忍背叛行为 I have zero tolerance for betrayal,
很快 他们就会永远记住这点 which they will soon indelibly learn.

我知道投票失利的原因 I know why you lost the vote.
有人去找了范德博格和艾布拉姆斯 Somebody got to Vanderburgh and Abrams.
雷米·丹顿 Remy Danton.
你妻子 Your wife.
我在他们两边都有联络人 I've got contacts on both their staffs.
他们三人见过一面 There was a meeting between the three of them.
我知道 我安排的 I know. I arranged it.
她让他们投反对票 不是这样 She told them to vote no. No, not true.
那两边的人怎么说法完全一致 Sources on two different staffs saying the exact same thing?
这完全没道理 That makes no sense.
我不是在跟你讲道理 I'm not telling you what makes sense,
我是在陈述事实 I'm telling you facts.
这可是个猛料 弗兰西斯 This is a juicy story, Francis.
卡莉绝对会喜欢 Carly will love it.
多数党党鞭的妻子在背后捅他刀子 The majority whip's wife stabs him in the back.
当心点 佐伊 Be careful, Zoe.
我在给你提供信息 I'm feeding you.
现在你该给我提供信息了 Now you have to feed me.
给我点更好的新闻 So give me something better.
回答我的问题 Are you going to answer my question?
她有没有那么做 Did she or didn't she?
快说 否则上帝保佑 Tell me now, or so help me God,
我会倾尽一生 I will make it my mission in life
毁掉你们的职业生涯 to not only destroy your careers,
碾碎你们努力博得的一切幸福与希望 but to obliterate all hope and happiness that you manage to cling to.
她说我们可以 在背后捅我刀子吗 She said it would be okay... To backstab me?
做我们认为对的事 To do what we thought was right.
那她的确让你们投反对票了 So she did tell you to vote no.
她说即使法案不通过也不是世界末日 She said it wouldn't be the end of the world if the bill failed.
这是她的原话 Those were her exact words.
这件事不许跟任何人说 明白了吗 You discuss this with no one. Is that understood?
没待在华盛顿为法案拉票你感到自责吗 Do you blame yourself for not being in Washington to secure the votes?
这么大的法案要靠团队合作 A bill this size is a team effort.
还有其它联署人呢 There are a lot of sponsors.
但你是主发起者 法案的负责人 But you were the chief sponsor and the bill manager.
话是不错 That's true.
那你不是该留在华盛顿吗 So shouldn't you have been in Washington?
我在竞选州长 I'm running for Governor.
我要履行对宾州人民的职责 I have a commitment to the people of my state.
你是否知道斯沃夫阵营 Are you aware that the Swofford campaign
今天放出新的宣传语 is putting out a new commercial today that says,
"如果彼得·罗素在国会都撑不下去 quote, "If Peter Russo can't follow through in congress,
他还能抵住酒精的诱惑吗" can he follow through with sobriety?"
访问到此结束 非常感谢各位 That's all. Thank you very much.
你不作出回应吗 谢谢各位 Do you want to comment? Thanks, guys.
议员先生 Congressman!
我不过是说了你常说的 凭良心投票 All I said was what you always say... to vote their conscience.
你鼓动他们违抗我 You encouraged them to defy me.
我见过他们了 你要我… I met with them. That's what you asked me...
不 你不是只见面了 No, that is not what you did.
我明确说了需要他们投赞成票 I specifically told you I needed them to vote yes on this bill.
根本毫无歧义 There was no room for interpretation.
你存心撒谎 不要再粉饰了 克莱尔 It's a deliberate lie, so don't try to sugarcoat it, Claire.
我需要雷米的帮助 你又不帮我 I needed Remy's help. You wouldn't offer any.
等下 Oh, wait.
你是为雷米这么做的 You did this for Remy?
不是 为我自己 我要把货从苏丹运出来 No. For myself. To get my shipment out of Sudan.
他施以了援手 He provided assistance.
以否决法案作为代价 In exchange for defeating the bill.
不 只是没有促成法案通过 No. In exchange for not helping it succeed.
不就是一回事吗 Which is the same goddamn thing.
你知不知道你危及了 Do you realize you have endangered
我们一直以来苦心经营的一切 everything that we have been working toward?
一切都安排好了啊 克莱尔 There was a timetable here, Claire.
直到最后一刻我们都得保持这股劲头 We needed strong momentum right up until the last minute.
你遇事不和我商量 我怎么依计划行事 I can't operate based on plans you haven't shared with me.
那你也该先问我一下 Then you should've asked me first.
不 我不会每次做决定 No, I'm not going to ask for your blessing
都征求你的意见 弗兰西斯 on every decision I make, Francis.
我们是一起做决定 We make decisions together.
我怎么没觉得 Yeah, well, it hasn't felt like that.
至少过去六个月不是这样 Not for the past six months.
我没觉得我们是在并肩作战 I don't feel as though I'm standing beside you.
有人知道这事 克莱尔 Other people know, Claire.
这可能成为我们的把柄 This could become a story about us.
而且是一竿子就能把人打死的事 And that's something you do not recover from.
谁知道 这种事永远洗刷不掉 Who? That's something that follows you for life.
谁知道 Who knows?
佐伊 Zoe.
你不是说她可以信任吗 I thought you said she could be trusted.
那我们之间的信任呢 What about our trust?
你无法控制她 是吧 弗兰西斯 You can't control her, can you, Francis?
你如果没撒谎 她就不是问题 She wouldn't have been a problem if you hadn't lied.
不 如果你没跟她上床 No, she wouldn't have been a problem
她才不是问题 if you hadn't dropped your pants.
你来我办公室 痛斥我一顿 And you come in here, to my office, and berate me
而实际上这都是你的错 when you're the one who's exposed us?
你休想把矛头指向我 Don't you try to turn this around on me.
我为你解雇了一半的员工 I fired half of my staff for us.
回绝了送上门的捐款 I have turned down donations for us.
起草了彼得的法案 I drafted Peter's bill for us.
搁置我自己的理想 去忙你的事 I diverted time and energy away from my goals for us.
好吧 我本不想这么说的 Okay, I don't wanna have to say this,
但你或许该听听 but maybe you need to hear it.
净水计划是重要 C.W.I. is important, yes,
但它根本比不上我们努力奋斗的目标 but it doesn't come close to what we are trying to accomplish.
你要认清这一点 You must see that!
我只是实事求是 I'm just being honest.
那就老实承认你利用了我 Then be honest about how you've been using me
就像你利用其它人 just like you use everybody else.
可从没说过会是这样 That was never part of the bargain.
是因为潮热[更年期症状]吗 Is it the hot flashes?
滚出去 Get out.
给我滚 Get out.
回家再见 I'll see you back at the house.
我在去办公室的路上 I'm on my way to the office.
到那儿给你电话 Let me call you when I get there.
不 现在就谈 No, no. We need to talk now.
我知道你很生气 彼得 I know you're upset, Peter,
但那也没有用 but that's not going to achieve anything.
我不止生气 弗兰克 I am more than upset, Frank.
注意你的语气 我没心情 Change your tone. I'm in no mood.
我不在乎 再见 彼得 I don't give a fuck! Good-bye, Peter.
你挂我电话 就别怪我接下来去找谁 You hang up on me now, you're not gonna appreciate who I call next.
你说什么 我承诺给我的人民工作 Excuse me? I promised my people jobs.
你承诺会让这份法案通过 You promised me you could get this bill passed.
你食言了 但我不会 You failed on your promise. I'm not gonna fail on mine.
无论你想什么办法 把这问题解决掉 So however you need to fix it, you figure it out.
否则 我就把科佩尼科和科恩社论的事抖出来 Otherwise, I go public with Kapeniak and the Kern editorial.
你需要冷静 You need to cool down
仔细地考虑下刚才说的话 and think very carefully about what you just said.
你不明白 我不再怕你了 弗兰克 You don't understand. I'm not afraid of you anymore, Frank.
那你就大错特错了 Then you're misguided.
我的过去已经公开了 My past is out in the open.
你再也不能以此威胁我了 You don't hold that over my head anymore.
他们不知道所有事 彼得 They don't know everything, Peter.
你毁了我 就是毁你自己 You destroy me, you destroy yourself.
快解决 Fix it.
你要我怎么做 加快进度 What do you want me to do? We have to accelerate things.
是不是早了点 Isn't it too early?
离选举还有近两个月 It's almost two full months into the election.
这样白宫的审查能做得很充分 That gives the White House too much time to vet somebody.
彼得越界了 Peter's crossed the line.
我们为他建立自信 现在控制不住他了 We built up his confidence, and now we're losing control of him.
也许他只是在发脾气 Maybe he was just blowing off steam.
不 他主意已定 我们得马上行动 No. He's determined. We have to act now.
你那边准备妥当了吗 You have everything you need on your end?
给我时间地点就行 Give me a when and a where.
最好是社交场合 Some sort of social setting's preferable.
还有吗 我需要现金 Anything else? I'll need cash.
大概三千 About three grand.
明早放在你上层抽屉里 It'll be in your top drawer by tomorrow morning.
先生 Sir...
一旦这么做 就不能回头了 Once we do this, we're committed.
我知道 我无法预测他的反应 Understood. I can't predict how he's gonna react.
我不能忍受勒索 Well, I won't be blackmailed.
谁 Hello?
佐伊·巴恩斯 Zoe Barnes?
是的 你是谁 Yeah. Who is it?
克莱尔·安德伍德 Claire Underwood.
佐伊 Zoe?
很抱歉我没有按门铃 I apologize for not buzzing.
我在楼下时 正好有人进楼 Somebody was coming in the building when I was downstairs,
所以我就… so I just figured...
有防火梯 不错啊 This is nice... fire escape.
你能别乱碰我的东西吗 Hey, could you please not go through my things?
对不起 我打扰到你了吗 Oh, I'm sorry. Am I intruding?
是啊 Yeah, actually. You are.
那我们真是彼此彼此了 Well, that makes it a two-way street, I suppose.
如果你是来惩罚我的 Okay, if you... if you came here to punish me...
好吧 我懂的 Fine. I get it.
真可惜 Such a shame,
你太天真了 how naive you are.
我不天真 是吗 I'm not naive. No?
我从一开始就知道一切 佐伊 I've known everything from the beginning, Zoe.
我和我丈夫之间无话不谈 My husband and I tell each other everything.
你不信我吗 Don't you believe me?
这里有蜘蛛让我抓吗 Is there a spider I can trap?
我不是来惩罚你 或是叫你停手 I'm not here to punish you or to tell you to stop.
我只是想让你睁大眼睛看清事实 I just thought I should open those big bright eyes.
我想你该走了 I think you should leave.
我想也是 I think I should too.
也许你没那么天真 Maybe you're not that naive.
换个小丫头连门都不敢开 A lesser woman wouldn't have opened the door.
到联合车站 Union Station, please.
我是克莱尔 现在不能接听你的电话 This is Claire. I'm unavailable to answer the phone,
如果你留了言 but if you leave a message,
我会尽快回复你 I'll be sure and get back to you shortly.
谢谢 Thank...
喂 佐伊 Hello? Zoe.
你不用轻手轻脚的 You don't have to tiptoe.
我以为你睡着了 I thought you fell asleep.
没有 在想工作的事 No. Just thinking about work.
我现在还没有料给你 很快就有了 I don't have anything for you yet. I will soon.
我知道 I know you will.
你愿意的话 可以在这里过夜 You can spend the night if you want.
还要早起开会 Early meetings.
那样就没时间回家换衣服了 Wouldn't have time to get home and change.
你好像心神不宁 烦心事太多 You seem distracted. I have a lot on my mind.
比如 Like what?
工作的事 和你一样 克莱尔呢 Work, just like you. No Claire?
或者她也算工作 Or maybe she qualifies as work.
她什么都没提吗 She didn't mention anything?
提什么 About...
你们不是无话不谈吗 I thought you didn't keep things from each other.
想说什么就说 Look, just say what you want to say.
她几个小时前来过 She came by here a few hours ago.
我们聊了一会儿 We had a nice little talk.
你走吧 Don't let me keep you.
你该回家休息一下 You should go home, get some rest.
代我向克莱尔问好 Tell Claire I said hi.
我是克莱尔 现在不能… This is Claire. I'm unavailable to answer...
沃顿家的灯待会儿就要亮了 The lights in the Whartons' house will go on in a few moments.
他们总是6点45准时起床 They always get up precisely at quarter to 7:00,
如果克莱尔在这儿 which is just the time that Claire would be going for her run,
她就会这时去跑步 if she were here.
谁都不听话 Rebellion on all fronts...
克莱尔 佐伊 罗素 Claire, Zoe, Russo.
我不能失去决心 I must not lose my resolve.
我会继续向前 I will march forward,
即便我必须 even if I have to do so...
独自前行 alone.
说中了吧 See? Told ya.
早上好 Good morning.
你好 弗兰克 Hi, Frank.
你好吗 很好 How are you? I'm good.
收到克莱尔的消息了吗 嗯 她的短信 Have you heard from Claire? Yeah, I got her message.
她感觉怎么样 好多了 How's she feeling? A lot better.
很好 她说她下周前都没法来 Good. She said she'd be gone for the rest of the week.
是流感吗 差不多 Is it the flu or something? Something like that.
我就过来到她办公室拿点东西 I just came over to pick up a few things from her office.
我可以找人送去的 不 没事的 I could've sent somebody over. Oh, no. It's no big deal.
其实 我还想来请你帮个忙 In fact, I also came here to ask you a favor.
你念的斯坦福 对吧 You went to Stanford, correct?
还致了告别辞 对 Valedictorian? Yeah.
你认识教务长吗 沃伦·泰斯戴尔 Do you know the provost? Warren Tynsdale.
他让我组织募捐活动 He flies me out to do fund-raising events.
可能我是校友的杰出代表吧 Supposedly I'm the poster child for alumni.
让世界更美好 Making the world a better place.
那很好 这事很重要 Well, that is good, because this is important.
琳达·瓦斯奎兹 总统的幕僚长 Linda Vasquez, the President's chief of staff...
她的儿子鲁本递了申请 her son, Ruben, applied.
我希望你能打电话给泰斯戴尔 I'd love for you to get on the phone with Tynsdale
告诉他学校应该录取他 and tell him that they should accept him.
这…我从没推荐过别人 I don't know. I... I've never recommended anyone.
这样更好 更有分量 All the better. It'll carry more weight.
我能先见见鲁本吗 Can I meet Ruben first?
我其实不想让琳达知道 I would really prefer that Linda not know.
其实 最好让他们母子 In fact, it would be better if both she and Ruben
都以为他是因为出色而被录取 believed he got in on merit alone.
能帮我和克莱尔这个忙吗 Will you please do this favor for Claire and me?
也算帮了总统 And for the President.
谢谢 Thank you.
增加对比度 More contrast.
我们要捕捉他的面部轮廓 We need to catch the edge of his face.
重新剪裁吧 左边加四分之一英寸 Let's re-crop it. Bring it in a quarter of an inch on the left.
能去… Would you...
有个克莱尔找你 Somebody named Claire?
雷米 Remy.
饿吗 You hungry?
我不吃猪肉 I don't eat pork.
什么时候的事 When did that happen?
开始给肉类加工业游说时 When we started lobbying for the meatpacking industry.
弗莱迪 给我半块肋排 Freddy, half a rack for me,
再给我朋友来点羽衣甘蓝 and some Collard Greens for my friend here.
不用了 我吃过午饭了 I'm good. I already ate lunch.
半块肋排马上就好 Half a rack coming up.
我一般不在这儿谈公事 I don't usually do business here.
这里是我的小秘密 This is my little secret.
希望你别说出去 I'd love it if we could keep it that way.
你不用担心我会带客户过来 I don't think you have to worry about me bringing clients by.
你好像很紧张 雷米 You seem tense, Remy.
流域法案的事你很生气吧 I assume you're upset about the watershed bill.
我不怪你 你只是在做本职工作 Not with you. You were just doing your job.
但我也得做好我的工作 But now I have to do mine.
我想建立合作关系 I'd like to propose a partnership.
我一向愿意合作 弗兰克 I'm always open to partnerships, Frank.
如果彼得·罗素支持天然气开采 If Peter Russo were a pro-natural gas candidate,
对桑科有多大的价值 how valuable would that be to Sancorp?
但流域法案反对开采 The watershed bill was anti-drilling.
彼得是支持就业 不是反对开采 Peter's pro-employment, not anti-drilling.
他只是想为选民创造更多就业机会 He just wants to bring employment to his people,
而桑科刚好在建设精炼厂 and Sancorp is building refineries.
但大多数都建在当地 Mostly on site.
你认为桑科会考虑 Do you think they would be open
在费城建厂吗 to considering Philadelphia?
我可以和他们谈谈 但不能保证 I can talk with them, but I can't make any promises.
我不需要保证 你就先去和罗素谈谈 Oh, I don't want any promises. Just engage with Russo.
描绘一下美好前景之类的 You know, give him a glimmer of good fortune.
来了 弗兰克 Frank, here you go.
闻闻这香味 Come on. Smell that.
真不想改主意吗 You sure you don't want to reconsider your stance on pork?
健脑食品啊 兄弟 Brain food, brother.
